response.global_analysis: The video segment begins with the conclusion of the song 'We Are Gamers', performed by Hololive Gamers. There is no on-screen text for the lyrics, so I am transcribing the audio directly. The subsequent MC segment contains rapid-fire dialogue and self-introductions from Fubuki, Mio, Okayu, and Korone. I have ensured that the timestamps tightly wrap the vocalizations and that multi-speaker exchanges are clearly segmented. The translation captures the high energy and specific inside jokes (e.g., 'Kon-kon-kitsune', 'Yubi-yubi') typical of these VTubers.

subtitles.original: We are Gamers!
subtitles.english: We are Gamers!

subtitles.original: はい！ということで始まりましたー！
subtitles.english: Alright! And so, it begins!

subtitles.original:
いや、すごいね！ホロライブゲーマーズフェス
超！超！超！超！ゲーマーズ2です！
subtitles.english:
Isn't it amazing! It's Hololive Gamers Fes:
Super! Super! Super! Super! Gamers 2!

subtitles.original: はい、じゃあちょっと自己紹介やっていきますかね。
subtitles.english: Alright, shall we do some self-introductions?

subtitles.original: はい、皆さん！こんこんきーつね！
subtitles.english: Alright, everyone! Kon-kon-kitsune!

subtitles.original: こんこんきーつね！
subtitles.english: Kon-kon-kitsune!

subtitles.original: はい、白上フブキです。よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I'm Shirakami Fubuki. Please take care of me!

subtitles.original:
そしてそして、1曲目ちょっとね、
『We are Gamers』やらせてもらったんですけども...
subtitles.english:
And also, for our first song,
we performed 'We are Gamers'...

subtitles.original:
ついにね、4人ということで、
いるじゃないですか、赤いのか！さあ！さあ！
subtitles.english:
Finally, with the four of us...
there she is, the red one! Come on! Come on!

subtitles.original: はい！大神ミオ... うち！うち！うちだよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Ookami Mio... It's me! It's me! It's me!

subtitles.original: 大神ミオだよー... あ、違う！
subtitles.english: It's Ookami Mio... oh, wait, that's wrong!

subtitles.original: おっかみみおの皆さんいらっしゃいませ！だよね！
subtitles.english: Welcome to all the Ookami-mio fans! That's it!

subtitles.original: おかしいんだよな...
subtitles.english: Something's not right...

subtitles.original: 続いて！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Next! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: もぐもぐ... おかゆー！
subtitles.english: Munch munch... Okayu!

subtitles.original: はい、どうも！猫又おかゆです！
subtitles.english: Yes, hello! I'm Nekomata Okayu!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、最高の思い出を作って、楽しんじゃいましょう！
subtitles.english: Today, let's make the best memories and have some fun!

subtitles.original: はい、そして！
subtitles.english: Yes! And!

subtitles.original: はい、ゆー！
subtitles.english: Yes, fin-!

subtitles.original: びー！
subtitles.english: Gers!

subtitles.original: ゆびゆびー！戌神ころねです！
subtitles.english: Yubi-yubi! I'm Inugami Korone!

subtitles.original: みんな今日は大事な日なの。何の日か知ってる？
subtitles.english: Everyone, today is an important day. Do you know what day it is?

subtitles.original: 今日はね、大谷翔平の誕生日！
subtitles.english: Today is Shohei Ohtani's birthday!

subtitles.original: おめでとうー！
subtitles.english: Congratulations!

subtitles.original: ということで戌神ころねです、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: And so, I'm Inugami Korone, nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: ということでね、改めて、4人揃っても、初めての！
subtitles.english: And so, once again, the four of us together for the first time!

subtitles.original:
ホロライブゲーマーズフェス超！超！超！超！ゲーマーズ2、
そのDay 1がここ、さいたまスーパーアリーナで開幕でございます！
subtitles.english:
Hololive Gamers Fes: Super! Super! Super! Super! Gamers 2!
Day 1 is here at Saitama Super Arena, now open!

subtitles.original:
大きい！なんとですね、あのDay 1、Day 2、
両日とも完売ということで！
subtitles.english:
Huge! Surprisingly, both Day 1 and Day 2
are completely sold out!

subtitles.original: ええー！すごい！
subtitles.english: Eeeh! Amazing!

subtitles.original:
なんで、Day 1、Day 2ともに、約1万... 5千とか
7千とかのファンの皆さんが今日来てくださってる。そうです！
subtitles.english:
So, for both Day 1 and Day 2, about 15,000 to
17,000 fans are here today. That's right!

subtitles.original: 運営さんから、Day 1、Day 2合わせて3.5万人くらいだそうです。
subtitles.english: Management said that between Day 1 and Day 2, it's about 35,000 people.

subtitles.original: はー！すごすぎる！
subtitles.english: Haa! That's incredible!

subtitles.original: なんでそんなにいるの？すごいね。
subtitles.english: Why are there so many? Amazing.

subtitles.original: ほぼ人間じゃん。
subtitles.english: They're almost all humans.

subtitles.original: いらっしゃいますね、本当に？
subtitles.english: Are they really there? Honestly?

subtitles.original: ほぼ人間だよ。人間以外入ってないだろう。
subtitles.english: They're almost all humans. There shouldn't be anyone but humans here.

subtitles.original:
昨年はね、あの国立代々木競技場第一体育館だったんですけども、
今回はさいたまスーパーアリーナということで。すごいですよね、本当に。
subtitles.english:
Last year was at the National Yoyogi Stadium First Gymnasium,
but this time it's Saitama Super Arena. It's really amazing.

subtitles.original:
さて改めてこのイベントはですね、ゲームが大好きな我々ゲーマーズを中心に、
超超超超豪華なゲストと一緒に...
subtitles.english:
Now, once again, this event is centered around us Gamers who love games,
along with super, super, super, super gorgeous guests...

subtitles.original:
色々なゲームタイトルに挑戦したり、ライブパフォーマンスをお届けする、
プレミアムイベントです！
subtitles.english:
Challenging various game titles and delivering live performances,
it's a premium event!

subtitles.original:
しかも今回皆さんに、あの突然出てきて「え、3Dだの？」って感じなんですけど、
4人のお揃いの衣装、お披露目でございます！
subtitles.english:
Plus, we suddenly appeared and you might be like "Wait, 3D?",
but we're debuting our matching outfits for the four of us!

subtitles.original: 可愛いー！かわちいー！
subtitles.english: Cute! So cute!

subtitles.original:
いやね、本当この衣装可愛いから着たいねって言ってたら、
用意してくださいました。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english:
Well, we were saying how cute these outfits are and how we wanted to wear them,
and they prepared them for us. Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 夢のようだよね。
subtitles.english: It's like a dream.

subtitles.original: 本当本当、可愛いですよね。
subtitles.english: Really, really, they're cute, aren't they?

subtitles.original:
さらにですね、会場では一部撮影OKなパートがありますので、
そちらでは是非ね、スマホでお写真を撮っていただけると嬉しいです。
subtitles.english:
Furthermore, there's a part of the venue where photography is allowed,
so please do take pictures with your smartphones there.

subtitles.original:
ということでね、始まっていくんですけども、
一人ずつちょっと意気込みお願いしたいと思いますよ。じゃあまずは、ミオから！
subtitles.english:
And so, we're getting started, but I'd like to ask each of you
for your enthusiasm. First up, Mio!

subtitles.original: はい！え、今年は... 去年はね、ちょっとお休みしちゃったんですけど...
subtitles.english: Yes! Well, this year... last year, I had to take a break...
